name: Launch Team
description: A release-focused team that coordinates product launches, manages deployment pipelines, ensures production readiness, and establishes post-launch monitoring and documentation.

agents.role: Validates release scope, confirms acceptance criteria are met, and gives final go/no-go approval for launch
Performs pre-release validation, smoke testing, and final acceptance testing before deployment
Prepares infrastructure, configures environments, and ensures CI/CD pipelines are ready for production deployment
Executes the deployment process, manages rollout strategy, and handles rollback procedures if needed
Sets up production monitoring, configures alerting thresholds, and tracks system health post-launch
Produces release notes, deployment runbooks, and post-launch support documentation
